scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:vite && npm run build:preload && npm run copy-html
scripts.dev: concurrently -n TSC,VITE "npm run watch:ts" "npm run dev:vite"
scripts.start: npm run build && npx electron dist/main.js
scripts.normalizing: concurrently -n TSC,VITE,ELECTRON "npm run watch:ts" "npm run dev:vite" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173&& npx electron dist/main.js"
